name: public-safety-2026-theme
description: WordPress block theme for public safety organizations
author: Your Name

scripts.env:reset: npm run env:destroy && npm run env:start
scripts.env:cache:clear: wp-env run cli wp cache flush && wp-env run cli wp rewrite flush && echo 'Cache cleared.'
scripts.theme:check: wp-env run cli wp theme check wp-theme-public-safety-2026
scripts.theme:activate: wp-env run cli wp theme activate wp-theme-public-safety-2026
scripts.theme:info: wp-env run cli wp theme get wp-theme-public-safety-2026
scripts.setup:homepage: npm run setup:create-homepage && npm run setup:set-homepage
scripts.setup:create-homepage: wp-env run cli wp post create --post_type=page --post_status=publish --post_title='Home' --post_name=home
scripts.setup:set-homepage: wp-env run cli wp option update show_on_front page && wp-env run cli wp option update page_on_front $(wp-env run cli wp post list --post_type=page --name=home --field=ID --format=ids)
scripts.browser:open: bash -c 'if grep -qi microsoft /proc/version 2>/dev/null; then explorer.exe https://localhost:8443; elif [[ $OSTYPE == darwin* ]]; then open https://localhost:8443; else xdg-open https://localhost:8443; fi'
scripts.browser:chrome: bash -c 'if grep -qi microsoft /proc/version 2>/dev/null; then cmd.exe /c start chrome https://localhost:8443; elif [[ "$OSTYPE" == "darwin"* ]]; then open -a "Google Chrome" https://localhost:8443; else google-chrome https://localhost:8443; fi'
scripts.browser:firefox: bash -c 'if grep -qi microsoft /proc/version 2>/dev/null; then cmd.exe /c start firefox https://localhost:8443; elif [[ "$OSTYPE" == "darwin"* ]]; then open -a Firefox https://localhost:8443; else firefox https://localhost:8443; fi'
